name: Refund for Nontaxable Fuel Uses

eligibility.description: Available to purchasers who paid tax under section 4041 but used the fuel for a nontaxable purpose or resold it.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A payment/refund of excise taxes paid on fuel when that fuel is used for a purpose other than the taxable use for which it was sold.
